features.name: parameterized module with unpacked array port
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module with an unpacked array port where the array size uses the parameter
features.snippet: module sub #(parameter WIDTH=8) (input [WIDTH-1:0] x [2:0], output [WIDTH-1:0] y); assign y = 2 * x[2]; endmodule

features.name: chained module instantiations with parameter override
features.description: Code should include multiple instantiations of the same parameterized module where outputs of one feed into inputs of the next
features.snippet: sub #(.WIDTH(WIDTH)) m1(E[0], E[1]); sub #(.WIDTH(WIDTH)) m2(E[1], E[2]); sub #(.WIDTH(WIDTH)) m3(E[2], E[3]);

features.name: parameterized unpacked array signal declaration
features.description: Code should include a signal declaration that is a 2D unpacked array with width determined by a parameter
